$description: Scoring constants for heatmap, change_risk, god_modules, and unprotected_hubs. Loaded once at daemon startup by Giulia.Knowledge.ScoringConfig and cached in :persistent_term. Defaults match the previously hardcoded values; tune by editing this file and restarting the daemon (no recompile).

enrichments.$description: Caps applied to enrichment annotations attached to pre_impact_check responses. Errors are uncapped (real bugs always surface). Per-caller cap and per-response cap are defensive against pathological volumes; on real codebases (Plausible: 98 findings on 3867 functions) they rarely fire. The dedicated /api/intelligence/enrichments endpoint is uncapped.
